items.title: 2026 NFL Draft grades, tracker: Live Round 2 analysis for every selection made in order

items.title: Once locks, which USMNT players have their World Cup spots in jeopardy?
items.summary: There are many players who will undoubtedly play for the United States at the 2026 World Cup. But some who were locks in the past are now set to probably miss out.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Kohli: 'It was my responsibility to hit boundaries at the right time'
items.summary: He heaped praise on Padikkal for attacking from ball one and said RCB "have a tremendous batting line-up"
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
